Application Status Check Portal  |  आवेदन स्थिति जांच पोर्टल

🔍 Registration Number se Status Check karein

* Apna Registration Number dalein aur Check Karein dabayein

📋 Status ka matlab:
🟠 Pending — Aapka application process mein hai
🟢 Approved — Badhai ho! Aapka application approve ho gaya
🔴 Rejected — Aapka application reject hua, karyalay se sampark karein
✅
Login Successful!
Dashboard par ja rahe hain...

⏰
Session Expire Hone Wala Hai!

Aap 60 seconds mein automatically logout ho jaayenge.

Inactive rehne par session band ho jaata hai
